/data/stations/5142.name: Central City East
/data/stations/5142.address:
Central City East station
Central City East
London
Greater London
EC4N 6AP

accessibilityData.stepFreeAccessNote:
There is step free access at street level from left side main station entrance to concourse level.

There are two lifts:

Lift 1, East side concourse from to Concourse / Street level

Lift 2, West side concourse to London Underground ticket hall and street level, but not platforms. Available only when the underground station is open.

/data/stations/9991.nreAlert: The lifts are out of order between platforms 4 and 5 and the station concourse at Central City station.

ticketData.ticketOfficeNote: The ticket office is located on the lower concourse.

accessibilityData.stepFreeAccessNote:
This is a Category A station. This station has step-free level access to all platforms via lifts.

The Assistance Meeting Point varies - please check with your operator.

/data/stations/9990.name: Origin Town
/data/stations/9990.address:
Origin Town station
Mount Pleasant Road
Origin Town
Kent
TN1 1BT
/data/stations/9990.nreAlert: The lifts on platform 2 are currently out of use. The next closest stations with step free access are High Brooms and Tonbridge.

ticketData.ticketOfficeNote: The ticket office by the entrance to Platform 2, is staffed on Monday to Friday only from 06:00 to 14:30. Outside of these times, please visit the main ticket office by the entrance to Platform 1.

accessibilityData.stepFreeAccessNote: This is a category B2 station. Step free access to platform 1 for services towards London via the main entrance. Step free access to platform 2 via the lift from Mount Pleasant Road entrance for services towards Hastings.  Step free interchange between platforms via steep path approximately 200 metres. Step access between platforms via the station footbridge.
